name: Black and White Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Black part:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, cocoa, and cream in a saucepan.
2. Cook to soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
3. Allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Add butter and vanilla extract.
5. Beat until creamy.
6. Pour into a well-buttered pan.
White part:
1. Combine 3 cups sugar, 1 1/2 tablespoons white corn syrup, 1 1/2 cups cream, and 1 tablespoon vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Cook to soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
3. Allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Add butter (or butter substitute) and beat until creamy.
5. Pour over the black part.
6. Let cool before cutting into small squares.
